name: Atrium Core Flow Latency
description: Request latency, error rates, and Web Vitals for verify.useatrium.me

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT percentile(duration, 50, 95) FROM Transaction FACET request.uri TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE error IS true) FROM Transaction FACET request.uri TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT average(duration) FROM Transaction FACET request.uri SINCE 1 hour ago LIMIT 10
SELECT average(largestContentfulPaint) as 'LCP', average(firstInputDelay) as 'FID', average(cumulativeLayoutShift) as 'CLS' FROM PageViewTiming TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 1 hour ago
